login.title: Login
login.subtitle: Welcome back, start your creative journey
login.welcomeMessage: Create an Infinite World of Art
login.humanVerificationHint: Complete the human verification before signing in.
login.bannedModalDescription: This account cannot sign in right now. Ban reason:
login.bannedDefaultReason: No ban reason was provided. Please contact the administrator.

register.title: Register
register.subtitle: Join us and unleash unlimited creativity
register.welcomeMessage: Join the Creative Community, Unleash Infinite Possibilities
register.benefit2: Exclusive Creation Credits for New Users
register.inviteCodeHint: If you opened the page from an invite link, the code will be filled automatically. You can also register without one.
register.inviteCodeHintInviteOnly: This site currently requires an invite code to register. If you opened the page from an invite link, the code will be filled automatically.
register.inviteOnlyNotice: Open registration is currently disabled. You can only create an account with a valid invite code.
register.verifyEmailSent: Verification email sent, please check your inbox
register.humanVerificationHint: Complete the human verification before creating your account.

verifyEmail.title: Verify Email
verifyEmail.successMessage: Your email has been successfully verified. You can now access all features!
verifyEmail.pendingMessage: We've sent a verification email to your inbox. Please click the link to complete verification.
verifyEmail.devTokenHint: Dev environment: Click the button below to verify using the token directly

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email address and we'll send you a password reset link
forgotPassword.successMessage: A password reset email has been sent to your inbox. Please check your email.
forgotPassword.devTokenHint: Dev Environment: Click the button below to use the token directly

resetPassword.title: Reset Password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter your new password
resetPassword.invalidTokenMessage: The password reset link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.
resetPassword.successMessage: Your password has been successfully reset. You can now login with your new password!
resetPassword.resetFailed: Reset failed, link may have expired
